devdoc.details: Implements a voting process with voter authorization and vote delegation.

delegate(address).details: Delegate your vote to another voter.

giveRightToVote(address).details: Authorizes an address to vote. Only the chairperson can call this.

transferChairperson(address).details: Transfers chairperson role to another address.

vote(uint256).details: Cast your vote for a proposal.

winnerName().details: Returns the name of the winning proposal.

winningProposal().details: Returns the index of the winning proposal.
